props.ChoiceText: You faced something people spoke of more than they believed in, and survived with a story others could not quite dismiss.
props.ChoiceBio: Facing a beast of local legend gave you a story that never quite sounded ordinary again.

0.TransitionText: Because facing a beast of local legend gave you a story that never quite sounded ordinary again, you kept to the wild and made solitude, sign, and patience your trade.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Hunter, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because facing a beast of local legend gave you a story that never quite sounded ordinary again, the wild taught you to read omens, remedies, and the moods of places others feared.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because facing a beast of local legend gave you a story that never quite sounded ordinary again, the track beyond familiar ground became more compelling than home.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Explorer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
